name: dotnet
description: Skills for .NET development including charting with LiveCharts2 and a modern C# 14 editorconfig baseline.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable .NET skills — LiveCharts2 guidance and a modern C# 14 editorconfig baseline
interface.longDescription: Use .NET to access reusable development skills for charting (LiveCharts2) and for setting up an opinionated C# 14 / .NET 10 editorconfig with preview analyzers and modern code-style rules.
defaultPrompt: Use the .NET plugin to help with LiveCharts2 implementation details or to set up a modern C# 14 editorconfig.
